word: G3373 - μηκύνω - mēkýnō - may-koo'-no - Grow up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μηκύνω

- Transliteration: mekuno

- Phonetic: may-koo'-no

- Definition:

1. to make long, to lengthen

2. in the Bible twice of plants, to cause to grow, increase

- Origin: from G3372

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3372; to lengthen that is (middle voice) to enlarge: - grow up.
